queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and decreased likelihood of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of a checking account balance below zero on credit risk reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Assessment of present employment duration between four and seven years as a factor in lowering credit risk.
